Welcome to Dragon Repeller. You must defeat the dragon that is preventing people from leaving the town. You are in the town square. Where do you want to go? Use the buttons above.

challengeFiles.name: styles
script

tests.text: Trebalo bi da dodate još jedan red na text.innerText.
Trebalo bi da koristiš kombinovani filter na text.innerText.
Treba da dodaš niz znakova " In your inventory you have: " na drugi red text.innerText. Razmak je važan.
tests.testString: assert.match(sellWeapon.toString(), /text\.innerText\s*\+=\s*('|") In your inventory you have: \1/);

tests.text: Bi trebalo da koristiš operator za spajanje kako bi dodao vrednost inventory na kraju vaše druge linije u/od text.innerText.
tests.testString: assert.match(sellWeapon.toString(), /text\.innerText\s*\+=\s*('|") In your inventory you have: \1\s*\+\s*inventory/);

description: Sada koristi operaciju += da doda niz znakova " In your inventory you have: " i sadržaj inventory u text.innerText. Osiguraj da uključi razmak na početku i kraju niza znakova " In your inventory you have: ".
